value.Soundcloud Description:
==LET(
  label_val, XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  is_whitelab, label_val = "WHITELAB",
  hypeddit_url, XLOOKUP("Hypeddit URL", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  
  TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE, 
    IF(is_whitelab, "FREE DOWNLOAD: " & hypeddit_url, IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, " ", IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, "𝐖𝐇𝐈𝐓𝐄𝐋𝐀𝐁 ", "") & "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW())), ""), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(label_val<>"", NOT(is_whitelab)), "Record label: " & label_val, IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow the artist(s):", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(is_whitelab, IFERROR(1/0), "Follow the label:"), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow CRESCENT:", 
    "CRESCENT_SC_HANDLE", 
    "CRESCENT_BANDCAMP_URL", 
    "CRESCENT_INSTAGRAM_HANDLE", 
    "CRESCENT_YOUTUBE_URL"
  )
)
value.Instagram Description:
==TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE,
  "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW())), ""),
  " ",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Record label: " & XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "Follow the artist(s):",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "Follow the label:",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "CRESCENT_HASHTAGS"
)
value.Youtube Description:
==LET(
  label_val, XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  is_whitelab, label_val = "WHITELAB",
  hypeddit_url, XLOOKUP("Hypeddit URL", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  
  TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE, 
    IF(is_whitelab, "FREE DOWNLOAD: " & hypeddit_url, IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, " ", IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, "𝐖𝐇𝐈𝐓𝐄𝐋𝐀𝐁 ", "") & "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW())), ""), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(label_val<>"", NOT(is_whitelab)), "Record label: " & label_val, IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow the artist(s):", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(is_whitelab, IFERROR(1/0), "Follow the label:"), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow CRESCENT:", 
    "CRESCENT_SC_URL", 
    "CRESCENT_BANDCAMP_URL", 
    "CRESCENT_INSTAGRAM_URL", 
    "CRESCENT_YOUTUBE_URL", 
    " ", 
    "#laburnum #futuregroove #techno #groovytechno #hardgroove #fastgroove #oldschooltechno #soundcloud #bandcamp #groove #minimalgroove #technomusic"
  )
)
value.M'hamed Share: ==IF(AI11="M'hamed",   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Option 1", AH11)), 10,   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Option 2", AH11)), 15,   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Whitelab", AH11)),     IF(T11="Znzl Mastering", 46, 15),   ""))), "")

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns Stripe URL to Frontend JSON

parameters.subject: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Webhook (Form Submit)').item.json.body.trackTitle }} scheduled
parameters.message:
=Hi,


Thank you for your submission! We have received all the requested information and sent you invites for the premiere time.

After checking everything is alright, we will schedule the publications and send you the links.
Thanks for the music,
The Laburnūm team ✦

attendees: ={{ [ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Requester Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Artist 1 Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Artist 2 Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Other emails for calendar invites'] ].filter(e => typeof e === 'string' && e.trim() !== '').join(',') }}
additionalFields.description: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Track Name'] }} on {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Record Label'] }}
additionalFields.summary: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Track Name'] }} on {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Record Label'] }}

additionalFields.description: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Track Name'] }} on {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Record Label'] }}
additionalFields.summary: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Track Name'] }} on {{ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Record Label'] }}

value.Soundcloud Description:
==LET(
  label_val, XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  is_whitelab, label_val = "WHITELAB",
  hypeddit_url, XLOOKUP("Hypeddit URL", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  
  TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE, 
    IF(is_whitelab, "FREE DOWNLOAD: " & hypeddit_url, IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, " ", IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, "𝐖𝐇𝐈𝐓𝐄𝐋𝐀𝐁 ", "") & "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW())), ""), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(label_val<>"", NOT(is_whitelab)), "Record label: " & label_val, IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow the artist(s):", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(is_whitelab, IFERROR(1/0), "Follow the label:"), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow LABURNŪM:", 
    "@laburnum-records", 
    "www.laburnum-records.bandcamp.com", 
    "www.instagram.com/laburnum.records", 
    "www.youtube.com/@LABURNUM-Records"
  )
)
value.Instagram Description:
==TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE,
  "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW())), ""),
  " ",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Record label: " & XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "Follow the artist(s):",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "Follow the label:",
  IF(XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - @" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AC$1, INDEX($A:$AC, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)),
  " ",
  "#laburnum #futuregroove #techno"
)
value.Youtube Description:
==LET(
  label_val, XLOOKUP("Record Label", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  is_whitelab, label_val = "WHITELAB",
  hypeddit_url, XLOOKUP("Hypeddit URL", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""),
  
  TEXTJOIN(CHAR(10), TRUE, 
    IF(is_whitelab, "FREE DOWNLOAD: " & hypeddit_url, IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, " ", IFERROR(1/0)),
    IF(is_whitelab, "𝐖𝐇𝐈𝐓𝐄𝐋𝐀𝐁 ", "") & "𝐏𝐑𝐄𝐌𝐈𝐄𝐑𝐄 - " & IFERROR(XLOOKUP("Track Description", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW())), ""), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Artist: " & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", " & " & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Track Name: " & XLOOKUP("Track Name", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(label_val<>"", NOT(is_whitelab)), "Record label: " & label_val, IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Catalog Code: [" & XLOOKUP("Catalog Number", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "") & "]", IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Mastering: " & XLOOKUP("Mastering Credits", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Buy Link: " & XLOOKUP("Buy Link", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Release Date: " & LET(d, XLOOKUP("Release Date", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IF(ISNUMBER(VALUE(d)), TEXT(VALUE(d), "dd/mm/yyyy"), d)), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "Tracklist:" & CHAR(10) & XLOOKUP("Tracklist", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow the artist(s):", 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 1 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>"", "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Artist 2 SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    IF(is_whitelab, IFERROR(1/0), "Follow the label:"), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ IG - https://www.instagram.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label Instagram Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    IF(AND(NOT(is_whitelab), XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), "")<>""), "▪️ SC - https://soundcloud.com/" & XLOOKUP("Label SoundCloud Handle", $A$1:$AZ$1, INDEX($A:$AZ, ROW()), ""), IFERROR(1/0)), 
    " ", 
    "Follow LABURNŪM:", 
    "https://soundcloud.com/laburnum-records", 
    "https://laburnum-records.bandcamp.com", 
    "https://www.instagram.com/laburnum.records", 
    "https://www.youtube.com/@LABURNUM-Records", 
    " ", 
    "#laburnum #futuregroove #techno #groovytechno #hardgroove #fastgroove #oldschooltechno #soundcloud #bandcamp #groove #minimalgroove #technomusic"
  )
)
value.M'hamed Share: ==IF(AI11="M'hamed",   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Option 1", AH11)), 10,   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Option 2", AH11)), 15,   IF(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("Whitelab", AH11)),     IF(T11="Znzl Mastering", 46, 15),   ""))), "")

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook

parameters.subject: =Laburnūm Premiere ✦ {{ $('Webhook (Form Submit)').item.json.body.trackTitle }} scheduled
parameters.message:
=Hi,


Thank you for your submission! We have received all the requested information and sent you invites for the premiere time.

After checking everything is alright, we will schedule the publications and send you the links.
Thanks for the music,
The Laburnūm team ✦

attendees: ={{ [ $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Requester Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Artist 1 Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Artist 2 Email'], $('Log to Sheets').item.json['Other emails for calendar invites'] ].filter(e => typeof e === 'string' && e.trim() !== '').join(',') }}
